items.summary: Implement core 2D platformer mechanics in useOvoGame.ts including smooth running, jumping, wall-jumping, sliding, coyote time, and gravity-based physics for the player character.
Design and implement at least 10 platformer levels in useOvoGame.ts with increasing difficulty, varied platform layouts, hazards, gaps, and moving platforms.
Implement portal objects in useOvoGame.ts that, when the player touches them, teleport the player to a specified target position within the same level or to the start of a specified level.

Implement a level exit/end goal in each level in useOvoGame.ts. When the player reaches the exit, they progress to the next level. After the final level, the game is considered complete and the score (time elapsed) is submitted.

Update OvoGame.tsx to render portals on the canvas with a visually distinctive animated appearance (e.g., pulsing glow or swirl), display the current level number, and show a game-complete screen with score submission and leaderboard when all levels are finished.
